enonce.texte:
Read the job advertisements below and answer the questions that follow.

JOB POSTINGS

1. Teacher Needed
A primary school in Yaoundé is looking for a qualified English teacher. The ideal candidate should have a degree in Education and at least 2 years of experience. We are looking for a patient, creative, and enthusiastic person.

2. Nurse Wanted
A private clinic in Douala seeks a caring and hardworking nurse. Candidates must have a nursing diploma and be able to work in teams. Experience in a hospital is an advantage.

3. Driver Required
A transport company is looking for a reliable driver with a valid driver's license. The candidate must know the city well and be punctual.
images: An illustration showing three different professionals: a teacher in a classroom, a nurse in a hospital, and a driver in a car.

questions.texte: Identify the three jobs mentioned in the advertisements.
questions.reponse: The three jobs mentioned are teacher, nurse, and driver.

questions.texte: Explain what qualities are required for the teaching position.
questions.reponse: The teaching position requires a patient, creative, and enthusiastic person with a degree in Education and at least 2 years of experience.

questions.texte: Justify why a candidate might prefer to apply for the nursing position in Douala.
questions.reponse: A candidate might prefer the nursing position because it offers an opportunity to work in a private clinic, and experience in a hospital is an advantage, which could lead to career growth.

questions.texte: Analyse the skills required for each job and suggest which job would be most suitable for someone who enjoys working with children.
questions.reponse: The teaching position would be most suitable for someone who enjoys working with children because the advertisement specifies that the candidate will work in a primary school with young students. The qualities of being patient and creative are particularly important for working with children.

intitule: Grammar: Adjectives in the Correct Order

enonce.texte: Put the adjectives in the correct order before the noun. Use the order: opinion, size, age, shape, colour, origin, material, purpose.

questions.texte: a / young / teacher / dedicated
a / nurse / caring / Cameroonian
a / large / modern / hospital / new
a / wooden / beautiful / desk / old
a / English / young / intelligent / teacher

enonce.texte:
Write descriptive sentences about the following jobs. Use adjectives in the correct order.

Jobs to describe: doctor, police officer, farmer, chef, pilot
images: An illustration showing different professionals: a doctor with a stethoscope, a police officer in uniform, a farmer in a field, a chef with a hat, and a pilot in uniform.

questions.texte: Write a descriptive sentence about a doctor.
questions.reponse: A doctor is a caring and dedicated professional who helps sick people. A good doctor is patient, knowledgeable, and hardworking.

questions.texte: Write a descriptive sentence about a police officer.
questions.reponse: A police officer is a brave and responsible person who protects the community. They wear a smart blue uniform and help keep our streets safe.

questions.texte: Write a descriptive sentence about a farmer.
questions.reponse: A farmer is a hardworking and patient person who grows crops and raises animals. They work in the fields and provide food for our communities.

questions.texte: Write a descriptive sentence about a chef.
questions.reponse: A chef is a creative and skilled person who prepares delicious food. They work in a kitchen and create tasty dishes for customers.

enonce.texte:
Write a short job advertisement (about 60-80 words) for one of the following jobs: teacher, nurse, driver, or farmer.

Your advertisement should include:

  • The job title
  • The location
  • Qualifications required
  • Qualities needed
  • Contact information

Use at least three adjectives in your advertisement.

questions.texte: Write your job advertisement here.
questions.reponse:
EXPERIENCED FARMER NEEDED

We are looking for a hardworking and dedicated farmer to work on our farm in Bafoussam. The ideal candidate must have experience in growing crops and caring for animals. We need a punctual and reliable person who can work in a team. A certificate in agriculture is an advantage. Please contact us at 677 123 456 for more information.

enonce.texte: Read the descriptions below and identify the job or profession being described.

questions.texte: This person teaches students in a school.
This person helps sick people in a hospital.
This person drives cars or buses.
This person grows crops and raises animals.
This person cooks food in a restaurant.

enonce.texte: Match each job with the tool or object they commonly use.

questions.texte: Match: Teacher
Match: Nurse
Match: Driver
Match: Chef
Match: Police Officer
